headline: Aflac celebrates 20 years as a World's Most Ethical Company
summary: Aflac Incorporated, the leading provider of supplemental health insurance in the U.S.,1 announced today that the company has once again been named by Ethisphere, a global leader in defining and advancing the standards of ethical business practices, as a World's Most Ethical Company. This marks the 20th consecutive year that Aflac has appeared on the prestigious list, making it the only insurance company, and one of only six companies in the world, to bear this distinction since the award's incep
